        SELECT [a].[value]
        FROM OPENJSON(@__activeStatuses_1) WITH ([value] int '$') AS [a]
    )
    ORDER BY [o].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_2 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_3 ROWS ONLY
) AS [o0]

LEFT JOIN [OrderItems] AS [o1] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [o1].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [o0].[CreatedAt] DESC, [o0].[OrderId], [c].[CustomerId]
